sections.paragraph:
Original: מחת

Transliteration: machath

Phonetic: makh'-ath

BDB Definition:

Mahath = "grasping"
  1. a Kohathite Levite of the house of Korah
  2. a Kohathite Levite in the reign of king Hezekiah

Origin: probably from H4229

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
